item.title: The defendant claims he was framed

item.title: Not Onion! :)
item.description: Florida is suing a healthcare company after accidentally paying it over $5 million instead of $50,000, with accusations that the extra funds were used by the CEO to run for congress. https://www.latintimes.com/florida-accidentally-paid-healthcare-company-5-million-instead-50k-ceo-used-extra-funds-run-571623 #funny

item.dc:creator: JarJarDrinks

item.title: Platypus Gifs for No Reason pt. 2
item.description:
I made a post yesterday of platypus memes and things for no reason but the gifs wouldn't load for some reason. Twas frusterating but now they work today! Previous post: https://imgur.com/gallery/platypus-memes-things-no-reason-SGBdvPK So here they are! The scratch soo good you'd floop platypus!
The swim roll and scratchies time!
The swim and cuddle
So smol and another good scratch
Swim and play!
The waddle march!
The floop and splash!
The floop again, but pretend that it was intentional and go on with your day!
The cuddle and great yawn!
item.dc:creator: Boppit92

item.title: I confronted him, I couldn't stop myself
item.description: I was preparing everything for our taxes and saw an email from a bank neither of us use. It was a deposit confirmation to his ex colleagues email. I recognized the name because my husband cheated with her not even a year into our marriage. We did counseling and he agreed to cut contact as they are both Marines and can get into alot of trouble. I did a more thorough dive and found nudes, messages, payments, phone calls spanning all 12 years. I documented everything, put it in chronological order and promised myself to not confront him until I spoke with my lawyer. I even sent a copy to my mother and my sister who live on the other side of the country in California. But I am a sensitive soul, ADHD and autistic, alone without family or friends. The core of my being demands fairness, and I have zero tolerance for liars and bullies. I feel numb and enraged, adrift in a rip current pulling me into a sea of darkness. I will lose my home, my beautiful fur babies, and my closest friend of 17 years. If there is any being in the void that can hear me, please sit by me awhile, I've never felt so alone.
item.dc:creator: stranded2718

item.title: Can you help? A small gesture from you could be a significant help to others.
item.dc:creator: BuddyGator

item.title: Incredible hand embroidery by Japanese artist Narumi Takada
item.description:
What are we looking at? Foot and paw prints on snow, obviously, but.. it is stitched by hand? This is EMBROIDERY???
This in-progress pic clears it up a bit but the end piece is still bafflingly incredible Narumi Takada: Stepping on Fresh Snow
item.dc:creator: insanitycontinuum

item.title: Bands I like.
item.description:
The butthole surfers
King missile
Cake.
Static-X
I really like Static-X
PowerGlove
Heilung
Tom Cardy
Little Big
Squirrel Nut Zippers
Rings of Saturn
Nekrogobkinkon
The Roddenberries
Magic sword
Create feature
PsychoStickk That's are just some of the bands I like. I can go from black metal to classical. Synthetic to jazz. So if you drive with me be prepared for my music to be as unhinged as my post.

item.title: I'm calling in gay
item.description: Some Meta employees reportedly resigning over the new policy that allows LGBTQ people to be called "mentally ill" Link to Bluesky post: https://bsky.app/profile/jasonkoebler.bsky.social/post/3lfdl6hjegk2a Original article: https://www.404media.co/its-total-chaos-internally-at-meta-right-now-employees-protest-zuckerbergs-anti-lgbtq-changes/ I also recommend 404media as generally doing good work and reporting.

item.title: Penn and Teller turn 50.
item.description: "2025 marks 50 years of our partnership. We will (try) to post a new memory from the past 50 years every week or so. We hope you enjoy… and thanks for sticking with us. 50th Week 1: from our days working the Renaissance Faire circuit. This is from the mid 1970s." -Penn Jillette
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid
